landing.title: The perfect meeting point
landing.lead: FlyndMe compares flights from everyone's city and finds the cheapest and fairest destination for everyone.
landing.diagramAlt: Flight paths from several origin cities converging on a single meeting point
steps: Add the departure city of each traveler.
FlyndMe compares flights with flexible dates and finds the cheapest destination.
Share results with your group and book on Skyscanner or Google Flights.

faqs.a: No. We recommend the best destination, then you book directly on Skyscanner or another search engine.
It measures from 0 to 100 how equally each traveler pays. The higher, the fairer.

faqs.q: How many travelers can I add?
faqs.a: Up to 8 travelers from different cities. The more, the more useful FlyndMe becomes.
They're real flight prices, but may vary slightly at the time of booking.

testimonials.text: We used to spend hours comparing flights from 4 cities. FlyndMe found our meeting point in seconds.
testimonials.name: Laura M.

testimonials.text: Perfect for our Erasmus reunion! Six friends, six countries, one search. Genius.
testimonials.name: Jonas K.

testimonials.text: My partner lives in London and I'm in Lisbon. This tool saves us so much time finding cheap weekends.
testimonials.name: Sofia R.

landing.exampleSub: 3 friends in Madrid, London and Berlin want to meet up. FlyndMe compares flights and finds the best meeting point.
landing.routesSub: Click a route to get started with a search

useCases.title: Friends in different countries
useCases.desc: Stop spending hours comparing flights from multiple cities. FlyndMe does it in seconds.

useCases.title: Long-distance couples
useCases.desc: Find the most affordable place to meet halfway — no more guesswork.

useCases.title: Erasmus & student groups
useCases.desc: Budget-friendly meetups across Europe. Perfect for planning reunions or trips.

useCases.title: Digital nomads & remote teams
useCases.desc: Coordinate group travel from anywhere. Find where the team can meet at the best price.

search.title: Where are you flying from?
search.subtitle: Add each traveler's city and pick your dates.
search.optimizeHelp: Choose whether you prefer the cheapest total or the fairest distribution.
search.optimizeHint: By default we find the cheapest destination for the whole group.
search.paxTooltip: Number of travelers from this city
search.paxDecrease: One traveler less from this city
search.paxIncrease: One traveler more from this city
search.dateWarnPast: This date is in the past — please pick a future date
search.dateWarnSoon: Departing in less than 3 days — prices may be higher than usual
search.dateWarnFar: This date is over 11 months away — airline schedules may not be available yet
search.dateWarnSweet: Great timing! Booking 6-8 weeks ahead often gives the best prices
search.dateWarnLong: Your trip is longer than 30 days — some airlines price long trips differently
search.unknownAirport: Unknown airport — pick from the list
search.emptyHint: Start by adding each traveler's departure city below

results.fairnessHelp: The higher, the more equally each traveler pays
results.verifyCaption: Cached estimate — check it against Google Flights
results.verifyUnavailable: Couldn't check live prices right now — still a cached estimate.
results.spreadSub: Between the most and least expensive flight
results.bookSub: One link per traveler. Book on Aviasales or compare on Skyscanner and Google Flights.
results.bookLabel: Book flights — one link per traveler
results.disclaimer: Estimated prices from live flight data. May vary at time of booking.
results.celebrateSub: This is one of the cheapest group flights we've found
results.groupSavings: Your group saves {{amount}} vs the most expensive option
results.alertHint: Want to track price changes for this route?
results.weekdayCheap: Flying on {{day}} — typically one of the cheapest days!
results.splitNote: In equal split, those with cheaper flights compensate those with pricier ones.
results.pricePerKmSub: Lower cost per kilometer = better value for money
results.partialNotice: Partial results: the search hit its time limit. Showing what was found — try again or narrow the search for full coverage.
results.dateFallbackHint: No cached price for your exact date — showing the closest date with data. The date shown is the real flight date.

groupNudge.title: Not everyone's confirmed their city?
groupNudge.text: Turn this into a group plan — each person adds the city they'd fly from and FlyndMe finds the cheapest, fairest place to meet.

verifyBadge.wasPrice: Was {{price}}/person (indicative) · now the real Google Flights price
verifyBadge.estimateHint: Price from a cached search feed; check the live price to compare against Google Flights.
verifyBadge.indicativeHint: Live re-pricing was unavailable; showing original search price.

errors.noOrigin: Add at least one departure city.
errors.returnBeforeDep: Return date must be after departure.
errors.noBudgetResults: No results within that budget. Try increasing the limit or turn it off.
errors.noResults: No results for those cities and dates. Try different dates.
errors.serverWaking: Server is starting up. Retrying automatically…
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.connection: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.departurePast: The departure date has already passed. Pick a future one.
errors.noResultsRoundtripMulti: No round-trip results for those cities and dates. Round-trip data across several cities is thinner, so try flexible dates, fewer cities, or search one-way.

codes.MISSING_ORIGINS: Add at least one departure city.
codes.INVALID_ORIGINS: Some cities aren't valid airports. Pick them from the suggestions.
codes.TOO_MANY_ORIGINS: Too many departure cities. Remove a few and try again.
codes.INVALID_PASSENGERS: Check the number of travelers for each city.
codes.TOO_MANY_PASSENGERS: Too many travelers in total. Lower the headcount and try again.
codes.INVALID_DEPARTURE_DATE: That departure date isn't valid. Pick another.
codes.INVALID_RETURN_DATE: That return date isn't valid. Pick another.
codes.DEPARTURE_DATE_IN_PAST: The departure date has already passed. Pick a future one.
codes.DATE_TOO_FAR: That date is too far ahead. Search within the next few months.
codes.NO_VALID_DESTINATIONS: No destinations to search. Try removing filters.
codes.INVALID_RETURN_DATE_ORDER: The return date must be after the departure date.
codes.TOO_MANY_COMBINATIONS: Too many combinations. Use fewer cities, destinations, or less flexibility.
codes.INVALID_TRAVEL_CLASS: That cabin class isn't available. Pick another.
codes.MONTHLY_BUDGET_EXCEEDED: We've reached this month's free search limit. Please try again next month.
codes.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.

alt.noAltSuggestion: Try adding more origins or using flexible dates to find alternatives.

messages: Calculating the best price for your group…
tips: Tuesday and Wednesday flights are often the cheapest
Booking 6-8 weeks ahead usually gives the best prices
Flying mid-week can save up to 30% vs weekends
Budget airlines often fly to secondary airports nearby
Flexible dates can reveal hidden deals
Early morning flights are typically cheaper
Connecting flights can be half the price of direct ones

map.title: Price map
map.ariaLabel: Map of European destinations with flight prices

compare.title: Destinations compared
compare.subtitle: Sorted cheapest first. Each bar is the average price per person; below it, the range each traveler actually pays.

social.counterSub: Join them and find your best meeting point

footer: FlyndMe — Find where to meet your group at the best price.
footerTagline: Find the cheapest place to meet your group.

pwa.installHint: Add to your home screen for faster access

share.title: FlyndMe · Recommended destination: {{dest}}
share.linkCopied: Link copied! Share it with your group.
share.expired: This link has expired or doesn't exist.

favorites.title: Saved destinations
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Tap the heart on any destination to save it here.
favorites.notInResults: {{city}} isn't in the current results. Run a search to see its details.

a11y.priceVerified: The recommended price has been re-checked.

groupChat.title: Share with your group
groupChat.sub: Send the trip summary to your group chat

baggage.title: Baggage heads-up
baggage.hint: Some flights use budget carriers ({{airlines}}) — check carry-on and checked bag policies before booking

tripInsight.roundtripSaving: Round trip saves ~{{pct}}% compared to booking two separate one-way flights

altDates.title: Flexible dates tip
altDates.hint: Flying on {{day}} could save you {{saving}} on average — midweek flights are usually cheaper

fxCalc.title: Currency converter
fxCalc.note: Approximate rates — check current rates before traveling

bookWindow.title: Booking timing
bookWindow.lastMinute: Only {{days}} days away — last-minute prices may be higher, book now if you can
bookWindow.soon: {{days}} days to departure — good time to lock in your fare before prices rise
bookWindow.ideal: {{days}} days out — this is the sweet spot for booking European flights
bookWindow.early: {{days}} days ahead — prices may drop closer to departure, but booking now guarantees availability
bookWindow.veryEarly: {{days}} days away — you're very early! Consider setting a price alert

shareLink.label: Share this search with your group

cheaperDate.text: Meet on {{date}} and the group pays {{total}} — save {{saving}}

arrivalCoord.diffDays: With the cheapest flights, you land on different days ({{time}} apart).
arrivalCoord.close: You all land close together: {{time}} between the first and last arrival.
arrivalCoord.spread: There's {{time}} between the first and last arrival.
arrivalCoord.partialNote: One leg has a stopover and doesn't report its arrival time.

priceHint.rising: Prices are likely rising — last-minute fares tend to increase significantly
priceHint.risingModerate: Prices may start climbing — consider booking soon to lock in current rates
priceHint.stable: Current prices look reasonable for this timeframe
priceHint.goodWindow: You're in a good booking window — prices are typically stable at this range
priceHint.mayDrop: Prices may still drop as the date approaches — but availability could decrease

visa.schengen: Schengen area — EU/EEA citizens travel freely, others may need a Schengen visa
visa.euEea: EU/EEA country — free movement for EU citizens, check requirements for others
visa.uk: United Kingdom — EU citizens may need to check post-Brexit entry requirements
visa.turkey: Turkey — many nationalities need an e-visa (quick online application)
visa.morocco: Morocco — visa requirements vary by nationality, check before booking
visa.other: Check visa requirements for your nationality before booking

season.title: Seasonal demand
season.peakSummer: Peak summer season — expect higher prices and crowds
season.peakWinter: Peak winter/holiday season — popular time, book early
season.shoulder: Shoulder season — good balance of prices and weather
season.offSeason: Off-season — lower prices and fewer tourists

dep24.text: First departure in {{hours}}h {{mins}}m — don't forget to check in!

soloSave.title: Group search advantage
soloSave.text: By comparing together, your group saves an estimated {{amount}} vs searching individually

perDay.title: Flight cost per day
perDay.text: Based on {{days}} trip days, flights cost ~{{amount}} per person per day

earlyAm.title: Early departure alert
earlyAm.text: {{origins}} have departures before 7:00 AM — plan transport to the airport the night before

group.cta: Planning with others? Invite your group
group.title: Plan your trip together
group.subtitle: Everyone adds their own departure city — FlyndMe finds the cheapest place to meet.
group.inviteHint: Share this link so each traveler adds where they're flying from.
group.shareText: ✈ We're planning a trip on FlyndMe! Add the city you'd fly from and it finds the cheapest, fairest place for us all to meet 👉
group.empty: No one's added a city yet. Add yours below.
group.searchHint: Anyone in the group can run the search.
group.createError: Couldn't create the group link. Try again.
group.addError: Couldn't update the group. Try again.
